Video.summary: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.
Video.title: Crawling to Vegas

Video.summary: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs. A man begs not to be arrested so that he can pay child support.
Video.title: My Bills Won't Wait

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over a wrinkly infant’s shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.
Video.title: Yard Work

Video.summary: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.
Video.title: Wardrobe Malfunction

Video.summary: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: A suspect flees from police and attempts to hide contraband from them. A driver is pulled over and is literally covered in his crimes. An employee of a cell phone store attempts to scam the police and her employers.
Video.title: Wearing My Crime

Video.summary: The pursuit of a criminal driver ends in a fire and police rescue. Police track down an elusive suspect. A family dispute over cleaning a garage ends with the police being called.
Video.title: A Song of Fire and Cleaning

Image.alt: A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning
A Song of Fire and Cleaning

Video.summary: Rather than stop, a driver decides to lead police on a high-speed chase. A woman is shot at by her ‘sugar daddy.’ A fleeing suspect dumps a suspicious liquid out of his window.
Video.title: Pour One Out

Video.summary: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.
Video.title: Two Mr. Fix Its

Video.summary: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. A man asks deputies for a break after they find illegal items in his truck.
Video.title: Gimme a Break

Video.summary: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.
Video.title: There Goes that Alligator

Video.summary: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.
Video.title: Being Honest Goes Along Way

Video.summary: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.
Video.title: Graveyard Shiftiness

Video.summary: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.
Video.title: Deja Vu

Video.summary: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.
Video.title: That’s Not Nice

Video.summary: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A bio-hazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.
Video.title: UC Drug Sting II

Video.summary: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.
Video.title: Bruised But Not Broken

Video.summary: A woman tells Officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at Officers and needs to be restrained.
Video.title: Vampire Woman

Video.summary: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl. Officers investigates a theft at a local store.
Video.title: Beads and Scalpers

Video.summary: An officer coordinates a reverse prostitution sting to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a stolen vehicle.
Video.title: Misrepresented

Video.summary: The victim of a home invasion was held at gunpoint. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.
Video.title: College Nightmare

Video.summary: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.
Video.title: Follow the Tire Tracks

Video.summary: A reverse drug operation proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a suspect responsible for burglary.
Video.title: Crooked as a Fish Hook

Video.summary: The occupants of a car with out-of-state plates try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known. An officer investigates a robbery at a truck stop.
Video.title: Don't Keep on Truckin

Video.summary: A man urinating in public flees from police on foot. A handgun is found in the vehicle of a driver who claims to be a student leaving class. Deputies find drugs in a man’s car when he runs a stop sign.
Video.title: When Ya Gotta Go

Video.summary: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife’s boyfriend’s car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.
Video.title: Kick the Car

Video.summary: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.
Video.title: All Aboard!

Video.summary: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.
Video.title: She Needed a Nap

Video.summary: A man takes off from officers when they roll up on a notorious hotspot for dealers. Cops surprise a jaywalker when they find some suspicious items in his supposedly borrowed jacket. A woman takes the heat for her beau when meth is found in their car.
Video.title: Wrong Place, Wrong Time

Video.summary: A bicyclist ends up on the pavement when he tries to out pedal a patrol car. A messy divorce leads to a gun-toting showdown between a Corvette and a Mustang. An angry dog ends up getting the best of a domestic dispute.
Video.title: Pistol Packing Families

Video.summary: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.
Video.title: Kill ‘Em With Kindness

Video.summary: A fleeing vehicle goes for a spin when officers execute a perfect PIT maneuver. Cops try to flush out a suspect who barricades himself inside a donut shop. Officers hit the meth mother lode when they stop a truck in a downpour.
Video.title: Late Night Snacks

Video.summary: After a tow service employee denies a woman her car back, she uses his body for batting practice. A man with a warrant explains his medicinal meth use. No lie is too big for a couple trying to convince officers they didn’t shoplift.
Video.title: Batter Up

Video.summary: A suspect runs through a hotel fence and then gives an employee some shocking news. Officers come upon two brothers who have just been in a knife fight. Cops arrive after an unruly man fires his BB gun at a neighbor’s child.
Video.title: You’ll Shoot Your Eye Out

Video.summary: A man can bail on child support payments, but can’t escape the police. One woman’s retaliation almost gets her girlfriend run over. A sluggish suspect denies the pile of marijuana in his car is his.
Video.title: Hit and Run

Video.summary: An officer arrests a driver who attempts to swallow drugs stashed in his mouth. An officer arrests a repeated drug offender in an area notorious for drug trafficking. An officer pulls over an unlicensed woman driver who is arrested for providing falsified identification.
Video.title: Pretty White Lies

Video.summary: An officer is attacked while attempting to break up a fight. Officers confiscate marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.
Video.title: I Want Charges

Video.summary: Teens are arrested after authorities find an open container and drugs inside a vehicle. A suspect is arrested after fleeing the police. Officers respond to a fight involving two men and a shovel.
Video.title: Pumping Iron

Video.summary: A man is taken to jail in connection to reports of solicitation. Officers investigate a stolen Escalade. An officer reunites a mother and her 5-year-old son.
Video.title: He's a Darter

Video.summary: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.
Video.title: Dumbfounded

Video.summary: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.
Video.title: Tit for Tat

Video.summary: Narcotics officers engage in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation.
Video.title: Hurry Up and Dance

Video.summary: A stolen vehicle investigation results in a brief foot chase and subsequent arrest. A driver is pulled over and is arrested for the possession of a controlled substance. While on patrol an officer spots an distressed man inside a vehicle with busted windows.
Video.title: Tuck and Roll, Hold On!

Video.summary: An officer assists with a burglary call at a mall jeweler. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call involving two newlyweds at a Las Vegas motel. An accident occurs during a routine traffic stop.
Video.title: A Man's Pride

Video.summary: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameraman’s equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.
Video.title: Running Amok

Video.summary: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.
Video.title: Life Changing Moment

Video.summary: A couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are outdated. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.
Video.title: Dishonest Dudes

Video.summary: An armed suspect’s bloody state takes officers by surprise. The driver of a stolen car bails when he is pulled over. Officers apprehend several suspects after they spot a pair of carjacked vehicles.
Video.title: Carjacked Up

Video.summary: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.
Video.title: The Young and the Reckless

Video.summary: By running through a shower, a man tries to throw the cops off his scent. A belligerent man violates a restraining order. A husband and wife give the police conflicting stories during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Drive and Dash

Video.summary: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.
Video.title: Clueless

Video.summary: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.
Video.title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Image.alt: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Video.summary: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn. Officers are forced to intervene when a jilted lover can’t take a hint. A nervous man attempts to hide his crime.
Video.title: One, Two, Tree

Video.summary: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Wake Up Call

Video.summary: A detective gets injured while chasing after a suspected car thief. A young couple gets caught up in cuffs after a bar fight. Officers find a surprising variety of items in a suspect’s vehicle.
Video.title: Cookies and Contraband

Video.summary: A parolee leads deputies down a dead end street. A jealous boyfriend tells the cops his version of events, but can’t stick to his story. An officer helps some frustrated citizens kiss and make up.
Video.title: Heat of the Moment

Video.summary: Emotions run high during a dispute involving alcohol and a beloved pet. A motorist struggles to keep his story straight. Deputies respond to a domestic episode and find the suspect in an awkward spot.
Video.title: Organized Crime

Video.summary: An escaped felon looks to Grandma for safe haven. It’s a blast from the past when deputies pull out a security device from the ‘80s. Later, worried neighbors refuse to give a dog back to its owners.
Video.title: Manic Monday
